subject: CRITICAL: Database Cluster 'db-prod-01' is UNREACHABLE
body: Monitoring Alert: The production database cluster 'db-prod-01' has stopped responding to health checks. Connection pool is exhausted and latency is > 5000ms. Immediate investigation required.
reason: Database is unreachable causing widespread outages.

subject: Urgent: Payment Declined for Subscription #INV-8821
body: Dear Customer, we were unable to process your recent payment for your 'Enterprise' plan. Your account is scheduled for suspension in 24 hours unless billing details are updated.
reason: Payment failed and account risks suspension.

subject: Client Complaint: 4-hour downtime on Tuesday
body: Hi, I am very disappointed with the recent downtime. Our operations were paralyzed for hours. We expect a formal RCA and a credit to our account for this SLA breach.
reason: Customer is extremely dissatisfied due to SLA breach.

subject: SECURITY ALERT: Unauthorized Login Attempt Detected
body: We detected a login attempt to your admin account from an unrecognized IP address (192.168.1.1) in a different country. Please verify if this was you or change your password immediately.

subject: Feature Request: Export Analytics to PDF
body: Hi team, it would be great if we could export the weekly email stats to a PDF report instead of just CSV. Our management team prefers PDF for their weekly review meetings.

subject: Weekly Newsletter: Updates & Tips
body: Check out our latest tips for improving productivity. Read more on our blog.

subject: System Maintenance Scheduled
body: We will be performing routine maintenance this weekend. Expect 5 minutes of downtime.

subject: Invoice #49281 Paid Successfully
body: Thank you for your payment. Your enterprise plan is active for another month.

subject: URGENT: Legal Notice - Terms of Service Violation
body: Your account has been flagged for violating our Terms of Service section 4.2. Please respond within 48 hours to avoid permanent termination.

subject: Lunch in the cafeteria today
body: Hey team, there's pizza in the cafeteria if anyone is hungry.

subject: API Deprecation Warning: v1 endpoints
body: Reminder that v1 API endpoints will be deprecated on the 1st of next month. Please migrate to v2.
reason: Requires developer action to prevent breakage.

subject: Bug Report: Login page 404s on Safari
body: When using Safari on iOS, clicking the login button redirects to a 404 page.
reason: Customer reported bug affecting user experience.

subject: Your package has been delivered
body: Your recent order #12345 has been delivered to your front porch.

subject: Welcome to our platform!
body: Thanks for signing up. Here are 3 steps to get started with your new account.

subject: Meeting Rescheduled: Q3 Planning
body: The Q3 planning meeting has been moved to 2PM tomorrow. Please update your calendars.
